notes:
# FileLens v1.1.1

## 中文

### ✨ 新功能

- **真实缩略图替换通用图标** — 网格 / 列表里的图片、视频、PDF、文档（RTF / Markdown / 代码片段等所有 QuickLook 能渲染的类型）现在都显示真实缩略图，不再是「PNG 文档」之类的扩展名通用图。压缩包 / 音频等无法预览的类型保持扩展名图标。
- **信息面板顶部预览区** — 单选时 inspector 顶部新增一块预览：图片直接全分辨率渲染，视频 / PDF / 文档走 QuickLook，宽度撑满 inspector pane、高度按图片比例自适应（≤ 320pt），多选时不显示。架构上为后续「文本预览 / 代码预览」预留好了扩展位。
- **拖拽到 Finder / Photos / 任意 App** — 网格视图：单选 / 多选都能直接拖出去，拖动时图标紧贴光标中心；多选 N 张落到 Finder / Photos 就是 N 个文件。列表视图：从 Name 列起拖，单选可用。
- **网格视图按时间分组** — 网格视图也加了「今天 / 昨天 / 最近 7 天 / …… / 一年前」分桶，跟列表视图一致；分组标题滚动时粘顶，长目录里随时知道当前所处时段。
- **网格 ⇧ 范围多选** — 网格视图支持 ⇧+点选取「锚点 → 当前」整段，跟 Finder 网格一致。⌘+点继续 toggle 单项。

### 🎨 改进

- **搜索防抖 250ms** — 输入搜索词时不再每键立刻全表扫，沉淀 250ms 没新输入才触发过滤。大目录（数千文件）搜索体感即时、不卡。清空搜索时即时返回完整列表。
- **列表视图列宽可拖调** — Size / Date Added / Kind 三列从固定宽改成可伸缩，列分隔符可以拖动调宽窄。
- **信息面板去掉重复图标** — 顶部预览区已经显示文件大图，下方原来的 56pt 小图标被去掉了，腾出来的空间留给文件名和元数据。
- **缩略图缓存按文件 mtime 失效** — 同名换内容（截图覆盖、导出覆盖）后立即显示新缩略图，不用清缓存。

### 🐛 修复

- 列表视图多选状态下，单击其中一项现在能正确收回到单选（之前会被拖拽手势的保护逻辑卡住）。
- 列表视图连续拖拽多个不同项时偶尔「拖不起来」的问题（拖拽手势 flag 被 AppKit drag tracking 截走 onEnded 后没重置）。
- 多选拖拽时图标视觉飘到光标右下方的问题（`.pile` formation 用 top-left 钉光标）；现在 N 个图标紧贴叠在光标中心，跟单选视觉一致。

---

## English

### ✨ New

- **Real thumbnails for previewable files** — Grid and list now show actual thumbnails for images, videos, PDFs, and any document type QuickLook can render (RTF, Markdown, source code, etc.) instead of the generic "PNG document" extension icon. Archives, audio, and other non-previewable types keep the extension icon.
- **Inspector preview panel** — Single-select adds a preview block at the top of the inspector: images render at full resolution, video / PDF / docs go through QuickLook. Width fills the inspector pane, height adapts to aspect ratio (capped at 320pt), no preview on multi-select. Architecture ready for future "text / code preview" extensions.
- **Drag to Finder / Photos / any app** — Grid: single or multi drag, drag image stays under cursor; dragging N images to Finder / Photos delivers N files. Table: single drag from the Name column.
- **Date buckets in grid view** — Grid view now groups by "Today / Yesterday / Last 7 days / … / Older" same as list view; sticky section headers keep the time band visible while scrolling long folders.
- **Shift-range multi-select in grid** — Hold ⇧ and click to select everything between the anchor and clicked item, matching Finder gallery view. ⌘+click continues to toggle single items.

### 🎨 Improvements

- **Search debounce (250 ms)** — Search no longer rescans on every keystroke; filtering kicks in after 250 ms of no input. Large folders (thousands of files) feel instant; clearing the search returns the full list immediately.
- **Resizable list columns** — Size / Date Added / Kind columns are now resizable instead of fixed width; drag the column separators to adjust.
- **Inspector header de-duplication** — The top preview already shows the file at large size, so the redundant 56pt icon below it is gone. More room for filename and metadata.
- **Thumbnail cache busts on mtime** — Replacing a file with new content under the same name (screenshot overwrite, export overwrite) shows the new thumbnail immediately, no cache flush needed.

### 🐛 Fixes

- List view: clicking one of multiple selected items now correctly collapses to single selection (previously blocked by the drag-protection logic).
- List view: occasional "can't pick up the next item" after dragging — the drag flag was getting stuck after AppKit drag tracking stole the gesture's `onEnded`.
- Multi-drag visual: the icon stack used to drift to the bottom-right of the cursor (`.pile` formation pinned its top-left to the pointer); now N icons stack neatly under the cursor center, matching single-drag.
